comment: Amazing host, the drop off and pick up option is a great option. I highly recommend this host and would definitely book with them in the future!
The trip was great I was running a little behind due to traffic and the host was understanding would definitely rent again
I enjoyed this car for my trip out of town. It rolled really smoothly and I was very comfortable when I was driving it. I would definitely read this car again 10 out of 10. Definitely recommend.
Car quality was excellent! Very easy pick up and drop off location and the host was incredibly attentive and responsive. Would highly recommend and rebook!

The car was good 2nd time renting a car front Annie. Luckily I was able to leave on of my kids home when running out because 1 seat belt was missing the buckle part I think it got closed in the seat but I couldn't figure it out.

I wish I could give this host 10 stars! This host is amazing and responds in a timely manner. I would book with them again. This car was everything it described in the description. I had no problem and was able to extend my trip for the extra time I needed
Wonderful experience, highly recommended. The car was as described and great communication. This is my 5th time renting from this host.
The pickup location and process was convenient and efficient. The car was clean, drove nice and was great on gas. The drop-off process was also quick and convenient.

Everything was perfect.. the pick up went way better than I had anticipated. The car ran amazing and was clean and smelt really good, has me looking for this type of model vehicle of my own, We had a little hiccup with a light and Annie took care of it immediately and extended my hours to make up for the time that wasn’t used. I was able to extend my days without any issues and got a great discount. Will definitely be booking again. AMAZINGGGGGGGGGG HOST

Everything was excellent. The host made things very simple for us. The vehicle was in beautiful shape and was better than we expected. The simplicity of getting everything done from start to finish was fantastic!

“Just had an amazing experience with on Turo! The car was spotless, ran perfectly, and the entire process was smooth and hassle-free. The host was professional, communicative, and went above and beyond to ensure everything was perfect. Highly recommend renting from them—will definitely book again! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐”

The pickup location was easily accessible and the host was great about communicating. We had a problem with the first car I rented, and they immediately answered, came and fixed the issue, and were very cordial. This car is super clean and easy driving. Lots of space too. Love the tint and the sunroof for Florida.

This is my first time using Turo and working with Annie was absolutely amazing. The car drove great. Pick up and drop off was easy. Annie was super communicative and overall a wonderful experience. I will continue to use her for all of my quick trips. Thank you!!!!

The pickup and communication with this host was great! We had an issue with the car, and they immediately answered, came with a new car, completed everything needed with Turo. I was amazed at their efficiency and helpfulness. Anytime I come visit family I will use their cars again. Thank you so much!

Wonderful host very easy going ! They definitely will accommodate to any needs or questions you may have. Very nice car ran smooth and smelled amazing and was very clean ! I definitely look forward to renting from them again in the future.

The host was very nice, and the location was good. I rated 4 stars because the car smelled of smoke, and that as my asthma acted  up a bit, but other than that, everything was great. I would rent again

Best Host ever. I wouldn't dare rent from another host unless there were no more options for Annie Ds and I was in a crunch. Her cars are wonderful.  Always clean. Always in tip top shape. She/They answer with the quickness. And goes above and beyond. I'm already booked up for my next trip with her.
Annie was an amazing host. Car was well kept and clean, zero issues all week. We will definitely rent again!
while this was my first time using turo i can definitely say the host experience was so excellent the host was so accommodating with me and helped me out a lot super good experience for my first time
The car and location was very convenient. Anne was very responsive with any questions/ request. I would book again; highly recommended.

Car was fine and provided the transportation we needed. There's some damage to the car but didn't create an issue when driving. Booking was easy. They delivered and picked the car up for us, which was nice. Thank you.
Easy peasy, lemon squeasy. 10/10 would rent again. Great little car!

At first the car I ordered wasn’t at the pickup , but then they notified me of a last minute change as soon as I called, however I had trouble starting the car and the person on the phone said it was a technical issue in the key fob, personally I wouldn’t send anyone with a rental with a key with issues luckily I handled the issue myself and replaced the dead battery. Other than that, I look forward to booking again. :)

This trip was such an enjoyable experience! Annie communicated handoff and drop off in such an easy way to understand. She also provided ways to reach the other cohosts in case I needed help. The car was clean and smelled great when I picked it up. I WILL be renting again when need be! Thank you so much Annie!

Aaron was exceptional with his customer services. He is quick responsive and respectful. I had a small issue with his vehicle and he immediately called me and in a hurry quickly resolved my issue by replacing my car with another that carried me out through my week. I would definitely rent from him again. You won’t be sorry when you rent. I know I wasn’t. Thank you!!!!🫶

Very convenient and helpful.  Quick service to swap cars out for me since tires weren’t put on yet.   Very smooth ride.  I’ve rented this car this past summer.  Communication was quick and professional.

I had an excellent experience with this car rental company. The booking process was simple and straightforward, and the staff was professional, friendly, and very helpful. The car was clean, well-maintained, and exactly what I reserved. Pickup and drop-off were quick and hassle-free. Overall, it was smooth, reliable service that made my trip stress-free. I’ll definitely rent from them again.
Car was perfect! Hosts were more than accommodating and great communication.  Pick up and return were a breeze. Look forward to booking another trip.
First time using Turo and Annie made it super easy.  The Expedition was great, fully loaded and clean.
Amazing host ! Very easy pickup and drop off and very reliable car ! It’s about my 4th booking with them they never let me down!

Host was excellent, very fast response time and was very understanding when I had to make changes to my trip. Car is very efficient on gas, I made it to NC on a full tank 4th of July weekend. Runs so smoothly it practically glides on the road, no issues. Will definitely be booking with Annie again!!

This is my second time renting with Annie. And it definitely will not be my last. The car is always super clean. Everything works well and it is always a smooth and easy pick up and drop off. As long as Annie’s car is available, I will always choose Annie’s car over anyone else.

Communication was good. I want to rate this lower but the hosting was easy and great but car quality oh my gosh for a hundred dollars a day (insurance included). I understand turning a profit but it was over priced and I don’t want to have to worry about intently looking at photos Turo!! These types of vehicles are good for intown price for cheap but I want to fly in and book a car in minutes knowing I’m booking quality because outside of not requiring a credit card like a rental company. What are you offering Turo!?

The car drove smooth. It was very clean. The process to pick up the car was so easy. Annie sends you very detailed and thorough instructions to make everything a breeze. Would definitely rent from her again.

Awesome SUV!!! COMFORTABLY fit 5 adults, 1 child, and a carpet. Smooth ride, and handles beautifully. Even in the Miami traffic on the highway. If we need a bigger vehicle for when family comes down and available, we'll definitely seek to Turo this beautiful Expedition again!! Thanks Annie!!

What an amazing host!! The process of pick up and drop off was made extremely easy. The host always responded in a timely manner and answered all questions promptly. The car was well worth it. Clean and in great running condition. Would definitely recommend this host.
This is the second rental we have had and are extremely satisfied. The car was clean and great on gas. Communication was always quick and pleasant. Thank you so much!
Very clean and spacious car. Comfortably fits 8 people plus luggage. Panoramic sunroof, leather seats and engine has a turbo. Front Seats are cooled and heated.
Great vehicle and very convenient! Annie was able to arrange for the vehicle to be picked up for me when my plans changed. Very nice people. I would definitely rent from them again!
Very professional, patient , and understanding! Responds to your messages very quickly ! The host made my trip very easy and the car was excellent!! Definitely recommend.

Amazing vehicle, host was very communicative and reasonable, the Rental process from pick up to drop off was very easy, we would definitely rent from them again in the future. Highly recommend using their services/vehicles! Thanks for an amazing vehicle for our trip!

It was a very pleasing experience with Annie's Rental. Very easy process for pick up and drop off. The car is Gorgeous. I really enjoyed driving it. I will definitely be renting again. Thank you for a wonderful experience.
2nd time renting from Annie. Consummate professionals.  Car as promised,  great communication.  Even wasable to extend with ease.
Car was great, had a few little  quirks but had no problems. Great on gas Orlando and back with alot of running around with a full tank. Didn't put any more in till we got back.

Always was a fan of Audi. First time driving one and must say it was a great experience. I’m 6’4 and had extra leg room. Car was very clean and host was awesome.  The car is really great on gas. Also handles really good on the road. Will rent again.
Amazing experience once again. Top notch service, amazing communication. Beautiful, clean, well taken care of vehicles. Recommend to anyone and everyone!
Annie was the perfect host.  She communicated very fast. The car was in perfect condition. I would definitely recommend and also rent from her again
What a great experience, I will definitely continue working with you! That Ford Expedition was a pleasure. Thank you for your great service!

My Check in and check out process was great. The truck was nice and was the exact size I needed for my family trip. I would rent from Annie and her spouse again. I would also recommend renting from them you want be disappointed.
Annie was a pleasure to deal with even when I had a time issue, she was extremely understanding! Car was beautiful and ran perfect. Would definitely recommend!!
The host were great, there were some accommodations that needed to be made on both ends and we were able to get it done without any hassle. The communication was awesome also 👌🏾
Pick up was SMOOTH… the ride was AWESOME.. definitely recommend. No more enterprise rentals for me this app is awesome!!
The pickup and drop off process went smoothly! The vehicle was super clean with no mechanical issues. The host was very friendly and always a phone call away, I will book again.

This one was by far the best. The look the features and the room. I felt like a celebrity on 95 coming and coming back home. I pray it’s available my next trip with my husband. Thanks you deserve every star

The car was great, very big to fit all my camping gear to take my family camping. Car was delivered clean and in good working order. Annie was very easy to communicate with. I would definitely rent again.
Great communication and easy pickup-drop off process. Car delivery/pickup options were so useful, cannot stress enough how easily Annie made my experience. Highly recommend

Great host, great car. The trip went very well, thanks to everyone involved and making this experience a successful one. The Nissan was a smooth ride, comfortable and efficient on gas. Will look forward to renting with Annie again
Communication with the host was excellent. The car drove smoothly. Gas usage was excellent. We were very happy with the vehicle and with our first experience.
Great car and excellent responses from the owner! Would rent again! Thanks for everything!
Absolutely amazing fast and responsive. These are the guys to do rentals with

By far my favorite host. By far my favorite vehicle. They make it easy for pickup and delivery. They message you back immediately. I choose them every single month. I wish I could give them 25 stars.. They deserve them ALL.......

Great vehicle. Very clean. Great service and communication from the host. The most fuel-efficient vehicle I've driven. The hosts were also very flexible when we had to extend the rental. Would definitely recommend
Car very nice & clean. Drives very smooth. Host was very professional & Kind. I will most definitely rent from them again. Thank you so much for allowing me & my family to rent your vehicle.
Ms. Annie's cars are all listed in my favorites, I rent weekly and I search my favorites first, sometimes no matter the price, I'll rent from her due to the five star services. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐❤️
They were wonderful hosts. Very attentive, very courteous, the car drove amazingly well with point a to point be the last 2 months. I will always book with him when I am down near this area.

No issues with the car. Impeccable condition. Was a super smooth ride. Bigger trunk space than anticpated, which is a plus. Had no issues with Bluetooth connection. And it pickup/dropoff was stress free.
I will definitely say this was a great rent. They communicated when needed and were very professional. I would recommend and will rent again. Thank you guys very much!!!!
This was my first time using this app and it was a great experience. Pick up and drop off was seamless. Annie is great. Would definitely recommend.

This is a Fantastic host she takes care business she no how to treat people an she is always there to answer your questions n see about your concerns I really enjoy the suv very roomy and very well taken care of
Nice, clean car. On time delivery for pick up. Great communication throughout the time of rental. Definitely looking forward to renting from this owner again.
I love the car, I can't wait to rent it again 😁 it was great on gas. The inside looks so nice. The rate was good. I really appreciate Annie for her car.
Great ride, super clean, drives beautiful! Ac very cold , radio was bumping okay…. host was very nice and responded in a short time frame. I highly recommend. Thanks again!
This was my second time renting from Annie and again a great experience! Great car and very communicative. Easy pick up and drop off.
Great car overall, great on gas takes you from point A to point B. Location is in quiet area. Hosts were responsive whenever I had questions. I will be using them again in the future.
This is the 3rd time I’ve rented with Annie, 3rd different car. She’s a great host and has great cars. Definitely would rent again.
Absolutely great host! Super friendly and a very understanding individual who always makes your rental pleasurable. Would highly recommend and will definitely rent from them again.
SHE WAS DA BEST AND HER HUSBAND HELPED ME AND EXPLAIN TO ME WHAT EVER NEED TO B DONE AND ASKED.THEY ARE PERFECT PEOPLE AND YES I WILL B DEALING WITH THEM IN THE FUTURE ASAP💯💯💯💯💯💯
Other than a slight hiccup at pick up and drop off, the car was clean, it drives well, and it was easy on gas. Would recommend this host and will use her again.
I had a great time with the car! I thank you so much for being an amazing host! I couldn’t have gotten a lot of things done without the car! I will be using the service again
the overall ride of the car is smooth. no issue with that, only one minor concern would be the passenger rear vehicle when it gets rolled down, it’s hard to roll it back up.
